description.value:
A small brass censer chased with grounding sigils. When a ritual user smolders a powdered substance over its coals — rather than snorting it raw — the smoke is read through the lungs slowly, and the body has time to brace.

Slow burn. Provides a +1 bonus to Constitution saving throws against addiction from inhaled substances administered through this burner.

effects.name: Ritual Incense Burner — Save Modifier
effects.description: Grants a +1 bonus to Constitution saving throws against addiction to inhaled substances burned in the censer.
